text_block_list.name: Infirmary Doctor
text_block_list.text:
Stand up straight and pull your chin in. Good. I'll
measure your height now.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
I'm sorry to ask for a physical exam so suddenly. I
just wanted to make sure my application is filled
out accurately.

text_block_list.name: Infirmary Doctor
text_block_list.text:
There's no need to apologize. There, all done.
You're 171 centimeters. Oh, you've gotten taller.

text_block_list.name: Infirmary Doctor
text_block_list.text:
I guess you must still be growing. I'll forward the
information on.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Thank you. I'll take my leave no—

text_block_list.name: Infirmary Doctor
text_block_list.text: Is something wrong?

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Oh, uh... No, nothing's wrong. This smell just
brings back some memories.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
(I remember lying in a hospital bed then, trying to
come up with a single equation...)

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: (A winning equation to beat her.)

text_block_list.name: Young Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Pant... pant... Okay! I'm gonna pick up the pace, Brian!

text_block_list.name: Young Brian
text_block_list.text:
Wow, really?! Me too, me too! I'm not gonna lose
to you!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
(I wonder, when was the last time I was ahead of
her?)

text_block_list.name: Young Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Doctor? May I borrow Kinematics in Sports next? I want to get faster.

text_block_list.name: Doctor
text_block_list.text:
Now's not the time to think about that. You need
to rest. You do want to recover quickly, don't
you?

text_block_list.name: Young Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Yes, but I think now's the best time to do a lot of
thinking.

text_block_list.name: Young Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
The truth is, I panicked because I was about to
lose... and that's how I got injured.

text_block_list.name: Young Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
That's why I need to come up with a winning
equation.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: (So I don't lose again...)

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Thank you for your help. I should go now.

text_block_list.name: Infirmary Doctor
text_block_list.text:
Don't mention it! All of the staff at the academy
are here to support you students.

text_block_list.name: Infirmary Doctor
text_block_list.text: Congrats on your debut. Keep it up!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Thank you. I will.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Sorry to keep you waiting, Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
When I greet Biwa Hayahide after her health
exam, I'm glad to see her looking refreshed and
free of worries.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The two of us are going to tackle the Twinkle
Series starting today.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Indeed. Now that the date of my debut race has
been decided, we know what we need to do.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Train hard, formulate a path to victory, and go
into the race with a solid strategy. The results will
follow.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
First, let's start by checking my times to assess
where I currently am.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Pant... Huff...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Biwa Hayahide is at the other end of the track in
a flash.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We decide to measure her time after each
furlong, or 200-meter interval. I look at my
stopwatch to check.

text_block_list.name: Fellow Trainer A
text_block_list.text:
That's a pretty fast lap. I wouldn't expect any less
from Narita Brian's big sister.

text_block_list.name: Fellow Trainer A
text_block_list.text:
Haha, don't look so surprised. We're just here to
scope out the so-called "number one contender"
around here.

text_block_list.name: Fellow Trainer B
text_block_list.text:
She didn't get that title for nothing. Her run was a
sight to see in the scrimmage I saw the other day!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Before I know it, a group of other trainers have
gathered around to watch.

text_block_list.name: Fellow Trainer B
text_block_list.text:
We're all trainers here, right? We need to see how
you carry out your training sessions!

text_block_list.name: Fellow Trainer C
text_block_list.text:
I must say, I was surprised when I heard Brian was
going to debut before her older sister. But I
guess—

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Excuse me. I'm glad everyone's having such a
good time, but I need to have a word with my
trainer.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Excuse me. I'm glad everyone's having such a
good time, but I need to have a word with my
trainer.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Well, well... Aren't you popular?
choice_data_list: I'm not the one who's popular. It's you!
I'm not the one who's popular. It's you!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I tell Biwa Hayahide what the other trainers were
saying about her.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Hmm. So I'm considered the number one
contender, huh?

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Well, that's very flattering, but I can't accept such
a mantle as things are at the moment.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
The reason they took an interest in me to begin
with is because I'm Narita Brian's sister.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Besides, I'm no more than above average at the
moment, and I'm not satisfied with that.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
I don't simply want to be above average. I want
to become the strongest racer here.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her steely gaze seems fixed in her mind's eye on
somewhere—or someone—as she says this.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
I wonder... What result will the final computation
of my equation bring? I wonder if victory exists
on the list of potential answers.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Pfft... hahaha! I nearly forgot the type of person
you are. Of course you'd say that.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Well, I'll need all the help you can give me. Let's
complete the winning equation... together.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And that's how my journey with Biwa Hayahide
begins.
